config.media_conversion.note: FFmpeg handles audio and video conversion. ImageMagick converts image formats.
config.media_conversion.disabled_desc: Enable this tool to let the agent convert audio, video, and images inside the workspace.
help.media_conversion.enabled: Enables the media_conversion tool for converting audio, video, and image files inside the workspace.
help.media_conversion.readonly: In read-only mode only the info operation is allowed. Real conversions are blocked.
help.media_conversion.ffmpeg_path: Optional custom path to the ffmpeg binary. Leave empty to auto-detect it from PATH.
help.media_conversion.imagemagick_path: Optional custom path to magick or convert. Leave empty to auto-detect it.
help.media_conversion.timeout_seconds: Maximum runtime for a single conversion in seconds.
